use std::fs;
use tempfile::NamedTempFile;

fn create_and_use_temp() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new()?;
    fs::write(tmpfile.path(), "key=value")?;
    let content = fs::read_to_string(tmpfile.path())?;
    println!("content: {}", content);
    Ok(())
}

fn process_temp_file() -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>> {
    let tmpfile = NamedTempFile::new()?;
    std::fs::write(tmpfile.path(), b"data")?;
    let data = std::fs::read(tmpfile.path())?;
    process_data(&data);
    Ok(())
}

fn process_data(_data: &[u8]) {}
